params.name: Manga Manuscript
params.description:
On Jan 6, 1946 AD, eighteen-year-old Tazuka published his first manga.
Tezuka's manga incorporated film techniques that went beyond readers' expectations and laid the foundation for modern Japanese manga. His subsequent animations made significant contributions to the anime industry and were praised both domestically and internationally. The studio he founded was seen as a pioneer of the industrialization of Japanese manga and trained numerous talented individuals for the industry. Tezuka is …
